metadata.methodology: 3 excellent ads from golden_ads.json, each degraded across 5 dimensions (one at a time). 15 degraded variants total. Used for P2-01 inversion tests.

originals.primary_text: Her SAT Score Jumped 360 Points! 📈 From 1010 to 1370 in Just 2 Months 🎓 📈 "My daughter's SAT score jumped from 1010 to 1370 in just 2 months with Varsity Tutors' 1:1 tutoring." "She uses her sessions for SAT prep --- and sometimes even for her AP classes when she needs extra help. I love that we can schedule each week around her busy school schedule." If your child is aiming for a great college, this program is a game changer. 👉 Fill out the quick form, and an SAT-prep expert will call right away to match your child with the right tutor. Learn More

Digital practice that mirrors test day. 200-point improvements in 8 weeks.**While other parents stress about whether their child is "ready," you'll have data showing steady progress: 1200→1250→1300→1400.Your child gets:🎯 A tutor matched specifically to how they learn📊 Weekly progress tracking (no guessing if it's working)💻 Training on the actual digital SAT interface🚫 Cancel anytime - no long commitmentsFor what Princeton Review charges for group courses ($1,500-2,000), you get 1:1 attention focused entirely on your child's gaps.Because your smart child shouldn't be held back by a test score that doesn't reflect their true ability.
